features.name: xor chain on indexed array elements
features.description: Code should include a chain of binary XOR operations applied to multiple indexed elements of an array like d[0]^d[1]^d[3]^d[4]^d[6]^...

features.name: reduction xor on bitwise-and masked expression
features.description: Code should include a reduction XOR operator applied to a bitwise-AND expression like ^(ecc_in & 32'b01010101...) for optimization testing

features.name: ecc parity computation array assignment
features.description: Code should include an array of parity bits computed via XOR trees across a data array, where each parity bit indexes into a different subset of data bits
